'''''Sidral II''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that carried the latest military equipment, timers and fusion cells, originating from a facility near [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

After the discovery of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]] project, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] attempted to discover the identities of the contractors involved in its construction. As part of this effort they decided to [[Capture of the Sidral II|hijack]] the ''Sidral II'' and study its cargo, in the hopes that it would reveal more about who was building the Death Star.

The capture of the freighter was undertaken by the [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]], [[Tuz]], and a rendezvous was planned to transfer the cargo to the Rebel [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Frazier]]''. The operation would be protected by two [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], led by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]].

The Rebels arrived to discover that the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Immortal/Legends|Immortal]]'' had already arrived and begun launching [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], though the Star Destroyer itself was some distance away.

The R-22s were able to hold off the TIEs while the ''Frazier'' conducted its boarding operation, retrieving the components, and both ships [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspaced]] to safety.

*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
